content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/0930e13864f2cd7c859724db6a1066968dfa79bd", "source_title": "Intermittent Fasting for the Prevention of Cardiovascular Disease Risks: Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "While several studies have assessed the potential effect of intermittent fasting on reducing cardiovascular risks, the findings are...", "direct_quote": "While several studies have assessed the potential effect of intermittent fasting on reducing cardiovascular risks, the findings are inconclusive.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "To compare the relative effectiveness of intermittent fasting methods in reducing key cardiovascular risks.", "direct_quote": "To compare the relative effectiveness of intermittent fasting methods in reducing key cardiovascular risks.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Studies were searched from Medline, Embase, Cochrane Library Central and Global Health to identify studies that enrolled adults (≥ 18...", "direct_quote": "Studies were searched from Medline, Embase, Cochrane Library Central and Global Health to identify studies that enrolled adults (≥ 18 years) to intermittent fasting methods and reported effects on one of the six specified cardiovascular risk factors.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Intermittent Fasting for the Prevention of Cardiovascular Di."}]}
